ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
BONUS – Launch Partnership
Negotiating The Deal
The number one thing to remember is this is value-based selling.
¨ You have to get out of your dollars per hour
¨ You have to look at what's the value going to be to them
¨ You need to get paid on the value
Timing and terms…
¨ Negotiate when they're in love with you (peak points of the launch)
¨ Another option is to have the money flow through you. Then you take your
percentage and then you pay them
¨ You want to negotiate when you get paid. (X percent of it within a week or two, and
the balance within 30 days, or something along those lines)
¨ Be very clear on when the money gets paid. ALL the money, the upfront money, the
retainer money, but especially the percentage of the launch money
¨ Negotiate relaunches (either a bigger check up front or get paid on the initial launch
and you also get paid (maybe a smaller amount) on the relaunch)
¨ Negotiate back-end sales
Another thing that could be on the table is equity, actually having an
ownership piece of the business.
¨ Maybe you can negotiate that you'll have a launch list when you come out of the
launch
¨ Maybe you negotiate a mailing, or two mailings, or three mailings into your
business, into your product, into your next launch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

BONUS – Launch Partnership
Every deal's a deal…
¨ You want to get all these things as crystal clear as possible
¨ How is your relationship going to end? What does the end of your relationship look
like? What's the out clause for each of you?
¨ Use plain English so it can be understood (avoid legalese)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
